content: {"file": "frontend/storyforge-ui/.angular/cache/17.3.17/vite/deps/@angular_common_http.js", "summary": "This file exports various Angular HTTP client module components and functions, including interceptors, backends, context tokens, error responses, event types, headers, parameters, requests, responses, status codes, URL encoding codecs, and configuration providers.", "rules": [{"name": "HTTP Interceptor Handling", "description": "Handles interception of HTTP requests and responses through Angular's HttpClient module.", "conditions": ["Interceptors are provided via DI or manually"], "actions": ["Intercepts and modifies requests/responses"]}, {"name": "HTTP Backend Configuration", "description": "Configures the backend for making HTTP requests, supporting various backends like FetchBackend and HttpXhrBackend.", "conditions": ["Backends are configured with provideHttpClient"], "actions": ["Sets up default or custom backends for request handling"]}], "dependencies": ["./chunk-H4XFGP3N.js", "./chunk-ZQGI3ZYG.js", "./chunk-6DT2DWOU.js"]}
